---
title: "Evan Nagahashi"
subtitle: "Student"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/evannagahashi/Math437_github.git
---

A little about me and my life.

I am currently an undergrad student at California State University, Fullerton with expected graduation in Spring 2027. I am a mathematics major with an applied concentration. 

## Education

California State University, Fullerton \| Aug 2023 - May 2027
